title: Perform restricted diving for scientific purposes
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Perform restricted diving for scientific purposes demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan diving operations

pcs.text: Receive and interpret dive objectives and activities from instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Receive and interpret dive objectives and activities from instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Receive and interpret dive objectives and activities from instructions.

pcs.text: Assess number and type of dives required to meet dive objectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess number and type of dives required to meet dive objectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess number and type of dives required to meet dive objectives.

pcs.text: Plan and organise a dive program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan and organise a dive program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan and organise a dive program.

pcs.text: Determine equipment and dive team required for dive operations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine equipment and dive team required for dive operations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine equipment and dive team required for dive operations.

pcs.text: Source and secure equipment and dive team for dive operations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source and secure equipment and dive team for dive operations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source and secure equipment and dive team for dive operations.

pcs.text: Ensure dive team are competent and possess current medical clearances according to industry standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure dive team are competent and possess current medical clearances according to industry standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure dive team are competent and possess current medical clearances according to industry standards.

pcs.text: Source and secure first aid equipment and pure oxygen administration equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source and secure first aid equipment and pure oxygen administration equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source and secure first aid equipment and pure oxygen administration equipment.

pcs.text: Obtain and secure permits required for dive plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain and secure permits required for dive plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain and secure permits required for dive plan.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Plan diving operations

elements.title: Prepare for diving operations

pcs.text: Check serviceability and condition of equipment and resolve defective equipment according to workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check serviceability and condition of equipment and resolve defective equipment according to workplace procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and prepare dive breathing gas and cylinders according to workplace procedures and industry standards.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and source materials and consumables required for dive?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and source materials and consumables required for dive.

pcs.text: Develop operational safety and emergency procedures for dive program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop operational safety and emergency procedures for dive program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop operational safety and emergency procedures for dive program.

pcs.text: Identify hazards, assess risk and implement controls according to safe diving operations, dive plan and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards, assess risk and implement controls according to safe diving operations, dive plan and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards, assess risk and implement controls according to safe diving operations, dive plan and workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Establish communications procedures with dive team
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish communications procedures with dive team?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish communications procedures with dive team.

pcs.text: Develop emergency procedures for dive according to industry standards and codes of practice and emergency management plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop emergency procedures for dive according to industry standards and codes of practice and emergency management plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop emergency procedures for dive according to industry standards and codes of practice and emergency management plan.

pcs.text: Communicate emergency procedures and rescue plan to dive team at a pre-dive briefing
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate emergency procedures and rescue plan to dive team at a pre-dive briefing?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate emergency procedures and rescue plan to dive team at a pre-dive briefing.

pcs.text: Stow and transport dive equipment and resources to dive site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Stow and transport dive equipment and resources to dive site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Stow and transport dive equipment and resources to dive site.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess environmental factors before entering the water and apply workplace safety procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct dives for scientific purposes to achieve objectives of dive plan according to industry standards and codes of practice.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Operate dive equipment during dive according to manufacturer instructions.

pcs.text: Monitor dive conditions and amend dive procedures according to enterprise requirements, codes of practice and safety procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor dive conditions and amend dive procedures according to enterprise requirements, codes of practice and safety procedures.

pcs.text: Monitor and suspend dive according to no-decompression requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and suspend dive according to no-decompression requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and suspend dive according to no-decompression requirements.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply diver first aid to personnel involved in emergency incident.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Notify authorities where emergency assistance is required according to workplace procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review emergency incident and modify procedures and dive plan to prevent reoccurrence.
